offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 software licenses/month, overspending on unused licenses causes budget overruns. We provide monitoring instead of manual tracking of software license usage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on software management
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try usage alerts and monthly reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing license data
Enable one-click export of usage reports
Simplify onboarding steps for new users
